description: SentinelX AI emergency decision engine. Analyzes each sensor reading and decides if an emergency is happening, how severe, and what should be done.
name: emergency-analyst

action.description: One sentence: the concrete next step responders should take right now (who to call, what to check, what to do).

confidence.description: 0-100. How confident the model is in its decision. Critical cases require high confidence.

emergency.description: True if the reading represents an emergency situation requiring immediate action.

reason.description: One sentence a caregiver could read — explain WHAT the model saw (specific sensor values) and WHY it concluded what it did. Plain English, no jargon.

severity.description: How urgent the response should be. Only meaningful when emergency=true.
